description_long: This is a modern, multi-story residential house with a flat, angular roof and extensive use of large, rectangular windows. The exterior features a combination of smooth white walls and a stone-textured base, giving it a contemporary yet grounded appearance. Multiple balconies and terraces are present, each with minimalist railings and overhangs, providing outdoor living spaces on each level. The house sits on a rectangular plot with a paved entryway and a small patch of grass surrounding the structure. The window arrangement is asymmetrical, with some sections featuring floor-to-ceiling glass panels, enhancing natural light and visual openness. The main entryway is accentuated by a wide set of steps and a covered porch, framed by clean geometric lines.
description: A modern, multi-story house with flat roofs, large windows, stone base, and multiple balconies, set on a grassy plot with a paved entryway.
description_view_0: Side view showing two balconies, large windows, and the stone-textured base with a paved walkway leading to the side entrance.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the angular roof, extensive glass panels, and symmetrical balcony railings on both upper floors.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with prominent balconies, large windows, and a clear view of the stone base and side entry steps.
description_view_3: Front view featuring the main entryway with wide steps, a covered porch, and a central arrangement of windows and balconies.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large rectangular windows and glass panels
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with wide steps, a covered porch, and minimalist geometric framing
